title: Subsystem Mission D — 4x2 Steering & Front Suspension
objective: Document exact-configuration 4x2 front track hub, front axle architecture (do not invent Twin-I-Beam vs solid-axle without OEM cite), radius arms / links, and spring rate evidence for CFG-2019-F450-REG-CAB-4X2-60CA-DRW.
success_criteria: Acquire/hash at least one OEM source stating 4x2 front axle architecture for 2019 Super Duty Chassis Cab F-450 (or exact silo).
Map CFGCOMP/IFACE nodes for hub, axle, radius arm, spring without borrowing 4x4-only geometry.
Record spring rates only with ASSERTION_EXTRACTED+token anchors — else UNRESOLVED.
evidence_required: Spring rate table or UNRESOLVED gaps
priority_note: Selected over Mission E (ICE removal) after chassis frame datum lock — aligns with existing FRONT_SUSPENSION_GEOMETRY research lane.
notes: Do not invent Twin-I-Beam vs solid axle. Prior RL-007 left architecture RESEARCH_REQUIRED.
Mission E (ICE powertrain removal) deferred as MISN-000005 stub.
